creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Mk/Uses/execinfo.mk has been removed (https://reviews.freebsd.org/D11488).  I believe USES=execinfo can simply be removed from the Makefile.  The distfiles for the version in the attached patch are no longer fetchable.  Changing to PORTVERSION=1.1.383 and updating the distfile resulted in some build errors.

http://pkg.awarnach.mathstat.dal.ca/data/11amd64-default/2017-10-27_10h32m55s/logs/errors/rstudio-1.1.383.log
